raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX XXXX. They was an unauthorized charged on my best buy credit card account i did not purchased and reported someone stole my account information. I filed for a dispute charge and requested to send a new card on and requested to dispute a charge. As of reporting third time last update was on XX/XX/year> with the company that I did not authorize the charges and my account somehow got hacked in the retail store, they are not going to dispute a charge i didn't authorize without my permission and not one has the authorization to use my account.
